title: Important Regulatory Updates for CAs & LLPs: May 2026
content:
# Important Regulatory Updates for CAs & LLPs: May 2026

Hi everyone,

Ek important update hai! Government ne Post Office transactions ke liye naye Income-tax Rules, 2026 ka comprehensive compliance framework announce kiya hai, along with key reminders from MCA and ICAI.

Here's a quick rundown of what you need to know:

*   **New Income-tax Rules for Post Office Transactions:** The Department of Posts, Ministry of Communications, has issued **SB Order No. 02/2026 dated April 27, 2026**, implementing a revised compliance and reporting framework under the newly notified Income-tax Rules, 2026.
    *   **Forms Consolidated/Replaced:** Existing Forms 15G and 15H have been consolidated into a single declaration **Form No. 121**. Additionally, Form 60 has been replaced by **Form No. 97** and **Form No. 98** for specified financial transactions conducted through Post Offices.
    *   **PAN Mandatory:** PAN is now mandatory for all specified transactions, including deposits, withdrawals, and account openings in Post Offices. In cases where a depositor does not possess a PAN, Form No. 97 is required.
    *   These rules came into effect from April 1, 2026.

*   **MCA Compliance Reminder for LLP Form 11:** The Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) issued a compliance reminder on May 6, 2026, for the timely submission of **LLP Form 11 (Annual Return of Limited Liability Partnership)** for the financial year 2025-26. The due date for filing this form is **May 30, 2026**.

*   **ICAI Invites Observations on May 2026 Exam Papers:** The ICAI, through a notice dated May 4, 2026, has invited candidates to submit their observations on the question papers of the CA Final, Intermediate, Foundation, and Post Qualification Course - INTT-AT Examinations conducted in May 2026. Feedback must reach ICAI by **May 24, 2026**.

## Read the Official Document

*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here (Department of Posts - SB Order No. 02/2026)](https://www.indiapost.gov.in/VAS/Pages/Content/OrdersandNotices.aspx)
*   [Visit the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) website for LLP Form 11 updates](https://www.mca.gov.in/)
*   [View the ICAI Notice for Exam Observations](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19106)

*Published on: 7 May 2026*
